explanation: Round: 47≈50, 83≈80. 50×80=4,000. Both rounds went up, so adjust down slightly. 47×83≈3,901. Closest is 3,900. Target: under 15 seconds.
Round: 32≈30, 58≈60. 30×60=1,800. We rounded 32 down by 2 and 58 up by 2, so the product is slightly above 1,800. 32×58=1,856. Closest is 1,860. Target: under 15 seconds.
Round: 19≈20, 41≈40. 20×40=800. We rounded 19 up (bigger effect), so adjust down: 19×41≈779. Closest is 780. Target: under 15 seconds.
Round: 63≈60, 27≈30. 60×30=1,800. We rounded 63 down by 3 and 27 up by 3. Net effect: slightly below 1,800. 63×27=1,701. Closest is 1,700. Target: under 15 seconds.
Round: 78≈80, 54≈50. 80×50=4,000. We rounded 78 up by 2 and 54 down by 4. Adjust: 78×54 = 80×54 - 2×54 = 4,320 - 108 ≈ 4,212. Closest is 4,210. Target: under 20 seconds.
Round: 67≈70, 93≈90. 70×90=6,300. We rounded both up, so adjust down slightly. 67×93=6,231. Closest is 6,230. Target: under 20 seconds.
Use difference of squares: 88×112 = (100-12)(100+12) = 10,000 - 144 = 9,856. Closest is 9,860. Target: under 15 seconds with this trick.
Round: 247≈250, 198≈200. 250×200=50,000. Both rounds went up, so adjust down. 247×198 = 247×200 - 247×2 = 49,400 - 494 ≈ 48,906. Closest is 48,900. Target: under 25 seconds.
0.52 ≈ half + a little. Half of 389 ≈ 194.5. The extra 0.02 × 389 ≈ 7.8. Total ≈ 202.3. Closest is 202. Target: under 20 seconds.

text: Which of the following is closest to 9,876?
explanation: 9,876 rounds to 10,000. The answer is clearly 10,000 — just read the leading digits. Target: under 5 seconds.
Each term is approximately 0.5. Three halves = 1.5. Actual sum = 1.513. Closest is 1.5. Target: under 10 seconds.
4.9≈5, 2.1≈2. 5×2=10. Powers: 10³×10⁴=10⁷. So 10×10⁷=10⁸. Actual: 1.029×10⁸. Closest is 1×10⁸. Target: under 15 seconds.
Round: 7,894≈8,000, 39≈40. 8,000÷40=200. Actual: 7,894÷39≈202.4. Closest is 202. Target: under 15 seconds.
Benchmarks: 1/7≈0.143, 1/8=0.125, 1/9≈0.111. Sum≈0.379. But use shortcut: average is about 1/8=0.125, times 3=0.375. Closest is 0.35. Target: under 20 seconds.
9²=81, 9⁴=81²≈6,561, 9⁸=(9⁴)²≈6,561²≈43,000,000=4.3×10⁷. Shortcut: 9≈10, so 9⁸≈10⁸÷2ish (since 0.9⁸≈0.43). Closest is 4.3×10⁷. Target: under 30 seconds.
Difference of squares: (1000-3)(1000+3) = 1,000,000 - 9 = 999,991. This is exact! Recognize this pattern instantly. Target: under 10 seconds.
Key benchmark: 2¹⁰≈10³ (actually 1,024). So 2⁴⁰=(2¹⁰)⁴≈(10³)⁴=10¹². Actual: ≈1.1×10¹². Closest is 1×10¹². Target: under 15 seconds if you know the benchmark.
√81 = 9 exactly. This is a perfect square you should recognize instantly. Target: under 5 seconds.
√49=7 and √64=8. Since 50 is just above 49, √50 is just above 7. √50≈7.07. Closest is 7.1. Target: under 10 seconds.
√81=9 and √100=10. Since 83 is just above 81, √83 is just above 9. Use linear approx: √(81+2)≈9+2/(2×9)=9+0.11≈9.11. Closest is 9.1. Target: under 15 seconds.
√200 = √(100×2) = 10√2 ≈ 10×1.414 = 14.14. Closest is 14.1. Key benchmark: √2≈1.414. Target: under 10 seconds.
√0.36=0.6 exactly. 0.37 is slightly above 0.36, so √0.37≈0.608. Closest is 0.61. Target: under 15 seconds.

text: ³√120 is closest to which value?
explanation: ³√125=5 exactly (5³=125). 120 is slightly less than 125, so ³√120 is slightly less than 5. ³√120≈4.93. Closest is 4.9. Target: under 15 seconds.
10% of 500=50. 7% of 500=35. Total=85. Or: 17%≈1/6, and 500/6≈83. Either way, closest is 85. Target: under 10 seconds.
25% = ÷4. 844÷4=211 exactly. Or: 800÷4=200, 44÷4=11, total=211. Target: under 10 seconds.
10% of 310=31. 9% is slightly less: 31-3.1≈28. Closest is 28. Target: under 10 seconds.
493≈500. 17% of 500: 10%=50, 7%=35, total=85. Adjust down slightly for 493: ≈83.8. Closest is 84. Target: under 15 seconds.
33%≈1/3. 727÷3≈242. Quick check: 3×240=720, so 727÷3≈242. Closest is 240. Target: under 15 seconds.

text: If a price increases from $83 to $97, the percentage increase is closest to:
explanation: Increase = 97-83=14. Percentage = 14/83. 14/83≈14/84=1/6≈16.7%≈17%. Closest is 17%. Target: under 20 seconds.
Cross-multiply: 3×7=21 vs 4×5=20. Since 21>20, 3/5 > 4/7. Or use benchmarks: 3/5=0.6, 4/7≈0.57. Target: under 10 seconds.
Cross-multiply: 5×13=65 vs 7×9=63. Since 65>63, 5/9 > 7/13. Decimals confirm: 5/9≈0.556, 7/13≈0.538. Answer: 5/9 is larger. Target: under 10 seconds.
2/5 = 0.4 exactly. Quick verification: 3/8=0.375, 5/13≈0.385, 7/18≈0.389, 3/7≈0.429. 2/5 is exactly 0.4. Target: under 15 seconds.

text: Arrange from smallest to largest: 5/8, 7/11, 2/3. Which is in the middle?
explanation: Convert to decimals: 5/8=0.625, 7/11≈0.636, 2/3≈0.667. Sorted order: 5/8 < 7/11 < 2/3. The middle value is 7/11. Target: under 20 seconds.
29/47: think 30/50=0.6. Adjust: numerator dropped 1 (makes smaller), denominator dropped 3 (makes larger). Net effect: slightly above 0.6. 29/47≈0.617. Closest is 0.62. Target: under 15 seconds.
Cross-multiply: 15×29=435 vs 19×23=437. Since 437>435, 19/29 > 15/23. Decimals confirm: 15/23≈0.652, 19/29≈0.655. Answer: 19/29 is larger. Target: under 15 seconds.
Classic formula: n(n+1)/2 = 100×101/2 = 5,050. This is a must-know benchmark. Target: under 5 seconds.
100 terms, average = (101+200)/2 = 150.5. Sum = 100×150.5 = 15,050. This falls between 14,000 and 16,000. Target: under 15 seconds.
10×11=110, 110×12=1,320. Falls between 1,200 and 1,400. Quick estimate: ~10³ adjusted up = ~11³=1,331. Target: under 15 seconds.
Formula: n(n+1)(2n+1)/6 = 10×11×21/6 = 2310/6 = 385. If you don't know the formula, estimate: average square ≈ (10²)/3 ≈ 33, times 10 terms ≈ 330. Actual is 385. Target: under 20 seconds.
Geometric series: sum = 1 - (1/2)⁵ = 1 - 1/32 = 31/32 ≈ 0.969. Closest is 0.97. Pattern: each term halves the remaining gap to 1. Target: under 15 seconds.
2¹⁰=1,024≈10³. So 2²⁰=(2¹⁰)²≈10⁶. But 2²⁰=1,048,576 which has 7 digits. Number of digits = floor(20×log₁₀2)+1 = floor(20×0.301)+1 = floor(6.02)+1 = 7. Target: under 20 seconds.

text: If a car travels at 95 km/h for 3 hours, approximately how far does it go?
explanation: 95≈100. 100×3=300. Adjust down 5%: 300-15=285. Or 95×3=285 exactly. Target: under 10 seconds.

text: If a car uses 8L/100km, approximately how many liters for 370 km?
explanation: 370km ÷ 100 = 3.7 units. 3.7 × 8 = 29.6 ≈ 30 liters. Shortcut: 400km would need 32L, subtract a bit for 30km less → ~30L. Target: under 15 seconds.

text: A rectangular room is 4.8m × 3.2m. Its area is approximately:
If you earn $52,000/year, your approximate monthly income is:
explanation: $52,000 ÷ 12. Shortcut: $48,000÷12=$4,000. Extra $4,000÷12≈$333. Total≈$4,333. Closest is $4,330. Target: under 15 seconds.

text: A 15% tip on a $73 dinner bill is approximately:
explanation: 10% of $73=$7.30. 5%=$3.65. Total 15%=$10.95≈$11. Shortcut: 10% + half of 10%. Target: under 10 seconds.

text: Light travels at ~300,000 km/s. The Sun is ~150 million km away. Approximately how many minutes for sunlight to reach Earth?
explanation: Time = 150,000,000 ÷ 300,000 = 500 seconds. 500÷60≈8.33 minutes. Shortcut: 150M/300K = 500s ≈ 8 min. Closest is 8.3 min. Target: under 20 seconds.

text: A swimming pool is 25m × 12m × 1.8m deep. Approximately how many liters of water does it hold?
explanation: Volume = 25×12×1.8 m³. Estimate: 25×12=300, 300×1.8=540 m³. Since 1 m³ = 1,000 L, that's 540,000 L. Target: under 20 seconds.

text: If the world population is ~8 billion and Earth's land area is ~150 million km², approximately how many people per km²?
explanation: 8,000,000,000 ÷ 150,000,000 = 8,000/150 ≈ 53.3 people/km². Shortcut: 8B/150M = 80/1.5 ≈ 53. Closest is 53. Target: under 20 seconds.
